Afghanistan.notes: e-Visa: Visitors must arrive at Kabul International (KBL).. Visitors may apply for an e-Visa in other countries, excluding some countries of residence (include United Arab Emirates).. The Emirati government restricts Emirati citizens from travelling to Afghanistan except for diplomats, emergency treatment cases and pre-authorized official, scientific and economic delegations..

Algeria.notes: Application for a tourist visa to Algeria must be accompanied either by a certificate of accommodation.. Persons may be denied entry if entering with a passport containing visas or stamps issued by Israel.. Visitors on tours organized to some southern regions by an approved travel agency may obtain a visa on arrival for up to 30 days..

Angola.notes: 30 days per trip, but no more than 90 days within any 1 calendar year for tourism purposes only.. Visitors must have a return/onward ticket and a hotel reservation confirmation.. An International Certificate of Vaccination is required..

Australia.notes: May apply online (Online Visitor e600 visa)..

Austria.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Bahrain.stay: Freedom of movement.. ID card valid..

Belgium.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Belize.notes: Permanent residents and holders of multiple entry visa of the United States may obtain a visa on arrival. Bearers of valid visas issued by a Schengen Member State are visa exempt for a maximum stay of 90 days..

Benin.notes: Must have an international vaccination certificate..

Bhutan.notes: The Sustainable Development Fee (SDF) of 200 USD per person, per night for almost all visitors to Bhutan. Additionally, if payment is made in US dollars from September 1, 2023 to August 31, 2027, the SDF is 100 USD..

Bulgaria.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Burkina Faso.notes: The change is not reflected in IATA Timatic, so travelers may be denied boarding..

Burundi.notes: Pre-arranged visa can be collected on arrival..

Canada.notes: eTA required if arriving by air, but are not required when arriving by car, bus, train or boat (including a cruise ship)..

Cape Verde.notes: Visa on arrival may applied for via the online platform (EASE) and issued at international airports in Sal, Boa Vista, São Vicente or Santiago. Visa fee is approximately 25–30 EUR.. Visitors must pay the Airport Security Fee (TSA) before visiting. The cost is 3,400 CVE (approx. 31 EUR ) and can be paid via the online platform (EASE)..

Central African Republic.notes: The change is not reflected in IATA Timatic, so travelers may be denied boarding..

Colombia.notes: 90 days - extendable up to 180-days stay within a one-year period..

Republic of the Congo.notes: Visa not required for passengers with a VIP invitation letter..

Democratic Republic of the Congo.notes: Passenger with a letter (Visa Volant) issued by the Ministry of Interior and Security can obtain a visa on arrival..

Côte d'Ivoire.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Port Bouet Airport..

Croatia.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Czech Republic.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Denmark.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Eritrea.notes: Pre-arranged visa can be picked up on arrival..

Estonia.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Ethiopia.notes: Visa on arrival is obtainable only at Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.. e-Visa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.. e-Visa is available for 30 or 90 days..

Finland.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

France.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Gabon.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport..

Germany.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Ghana.notes: Pre-arranged visa can be picked up on arrival..

Greece.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Hungary.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Iceland.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

India.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports or 5 designated seaports.. An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year.. Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa.. Visa on arrival is applicable to UAE citizens if they had earlier obtained e-Visa or regular/paper visa for India. This facility is not available to citizens if they or either of their parents or grandparents (paternal or maternal) was born in or is a permanent resident of Pakistan.. Visa on arrival is only available at the following airports: Bengaluru. Chennai. Delhi. Hyderabad. Kolkata. Mumbai. Kochi. Kozhikode. Ahmedabad..

Israel.notes: Validity of ETA-IL is 2 years from the date of approval..

Italy.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Jamaica.notes: The change is not reflected in IATA Timatic, so travelers may be denied boarding..

Kenya.notes: Applications can be submitted up to 90 days prior to travel and must be submitted at least 3 days in advance.. eTA fee is 32.50 USD.. Proof of reservation at the hotel where visitors plan to stay is required (if staying with friends, an invitation letter is also acceptable).. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.. Visitors can also be entered on an East Africa tourist visa issued by Rwanda or Uganda..

South Korea.notes: K-ETA exemption until the end of 2026.. The validity period of a K-ETA is 3 years from the date of approval..

Kuwait.stay: Freedom of movement.. ID card valid..

Laos.notes: 18 of the 33 border crossings are only open to regular visa holders.. e-Visa may be used to enter Laos through the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 3 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges, in Boten (road and railroad ), and in Vientiane (at Khamsavath railway station ).. Visa on arrival is available at the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 4 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges and 7 border crossings..

Latvia.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Lebanon.notes: Emiratis do not need a visa to enter Lebanon. (6 months - extendable to 1-year)..

Liechtenstein.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Lithuania.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Luxembourg.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Madagascar.notes: For stays of 61 to 90 days, the visa fee is 59 USD..

Malta.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Mauritania.notes: Available at any international airport or land border crossing..

Mozambique.notes: Visitors must register their ETA on the e-Visa platform at least 48 hours before travel and pay a processing fee of 48 USD. In addition, an extension of 30 days is possible..

Myanmar.notes: Visa on arrival if passengers with a letter of approval issued by the Ministry of Hotels and Tourism..

Namibia.notes: Visa on arrival is available at the following locations: Hosea Kutako International Airport. Impalila Island. Katima Mulilo. Ngoma. Trans Kalahari ( Buitepos ). Walvis Bay Airport..

Netherlands.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

New Zealand.notes: International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy must be paid upon requesting an Electronic Travel Authority.. Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement ), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure. Such travellers are not required to pay the International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy..

Niger.notes: The change is not reflected in IATA Timatic, so travelers may be denied boarding..

Nigeria.notes: Holders of written e-Visa approval issued by the Immigration Authority can obtain a visa on arrival, provided they hold a visa application form and e-Visa application payment receipt and have an invitation letter from a Nigerian company accepting immigration responsibilities..

Norway.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Oman.stay: Freedom of movement.. ID card valid..

Papua New Guinea.notes: Visa on arrival available at Port Moresby airport.. You can apply for a visa online under the "Tourist - Own Itinerary" category..

Philippines.notes: A single or multiple entry eVisa for stays of up to 59 days is also available..

Poland.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Portugal.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Qatar.stay: Freedom of movement.. ID card valid..

Romania.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Russia.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period.. As of June 30, 2025, foreigners entering Russia without a visa must pre-register in the Gosuslugi RuID Gosuslugi RuID mobile app and receive a digital code at least 72 hours before entry..

Rwanda.notes: Visitors can also be entered on an East Africa Tourist Visa issued by Kenya or Uganda..

Saudi Arabia.stay: Freedom of movement.. ID card valid..

Seychelles.notes: Application can be submitted up to 30 days before travel.. Visitors must upload a reservation confirmation(s) for each visitor's location of stay in Seychelles.. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.. Payment of the fee (EUR 10) by credit or debit card.. Valid for one journey only and it expires once exit the country..

Slovakia.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Slovenia.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

South Sudan.notes: Obtainable online 30 days single entry for 100 USD, 90 days multiple entry for 200 USD and 180 days multiple entry for 350 USD.. Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel..

Spain.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Suriname.notes: An entrance fee of USD 50 or EUR 50 must be paid online prior to arrival.. Multiple entry e-Visa is also available..

Sweden.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Switzerland.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area..

Syria.notes: According to IATA, visitors can be issued a visa on arrival..

Thailand.notes: Maximum 2 visits annually if not arriving by air..

Turkmenistan.notes: 10-day visa on arrival if holding a letter of invitation provided by a company registered in Turkmenistan with a prior approval from the Foreign Ministry. Visitors can apply to extend their stay for an additional 10 days.. When transiting between two non-bordering countries, visitors can obtain a Turkmenistan transit visa for a five-day stay. This must be applied for in advance at the Turkmenistan Embassy. Visitors must also submit copies of the visas for the country of entry into Turkmenistan and the country of departure from Turkmenistan. Visa fee is 20 USD..

Uganda.notes: Visitors can also be entered on an East Africa Tourist Visa issued by Kenya or Rwanda..

United Kingdom.notes: Authorisation lasts up to 2 years, with multiple entries permitted..

Venezuela.notes: Introduction of Electronic Visa System for Tourist and Business Travelers..

Vietnam.notes: e-Visa is valid for 90 days and multiple entry..

Yemen.notes: Separately, Yemen introduced an e-Visa system for visitors who meet certain eligibility requirements (group travel of 10 or more people, business trips, and transit etc.)..

Zambia.notes: Also eligible for a universal visa allowing access to Zimbabwe..

Zimbabwe.notes: Also eligible for a universal visa allowing access to Zambia..
